zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Talbot於大約1024年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利可洛維爾時，她的父親Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville45歲，母親Marie "Adelina" de Meulan20歲。她和Robert d'Estouteville I至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於大約1101年在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利艾斯陶迪維爾-艾卡利斯享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne de Talbot于大约1024年出生在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利可洛維爾时，她的父亲Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville45岁，母亲Marie "Adelina" de Meulan20岁。她和Robert d'Estouteville I至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于大约1101年在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利艾斯陶迪維爾-艾卡利斯享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Talbot was born about 1024, in Cleuville, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, her father, Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville, was 45 and her mother, Marie "Adelina" de Meulan, was 20. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Robert d'Estouteville I. She died about 1101, in Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Talbot est née environ 1024, à Cleuville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Marie "Adelina" de Meulan, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Robert d'Estouteville I. Elle est décédée environ 1101, à Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Talbot um 1024 in Cleuville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville 45 und ihre Mutter Marie "Adelina" de Meulan 20. Sie hatte mit Robert d'Estouteville I mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1101 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Talbot è nata il circa 1024 nel Cleuville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Marie "Adelina" de Meulan, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Robert d'Estouteville I. Morì circa 1101, nel Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Talbotが約1024年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメクレウヴィルで生まれた時，父Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuvilleは45歳，母Marie "Adelina" de Meulanは20歳であった。彼女はRobert d'Estouteville Iとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1101年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメエストウテヴィレ-eカレスで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Talbot(이)가 대략 1024년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 클레우빌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie "Adelina" de Meulan(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Robert d'Estouteville I(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1101년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 에스토우테비레-e캘레스에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Abt 1024–about 1101: tany ho any amin'ny 1024–tany ho any amin'ny 1101

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Talbot nasceu aproximadamente 1024, em Cleuville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Marie "Adelina" de Meulan, tinha 20 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Robert d'Estouteville I. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1101, em Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Talbot родилась около 1024 г. в местности клеувилл, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie "Adelina" de Meulan, 20. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Robert d'Estouteville I. Она умерла около 1101 г. в местности эстоутевилле-eкаллесь, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция в возрасте 79 лет.

sm.Abt 1024–about 1101: e tusa o le 1024–e tusa o le 1101

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Talbot nació aproximadamente 1024, en Cleuville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Marie "Adelina" de Meulan, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Robert d'Estouteville I. Murió aproximadamente 1101, en Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 79 años.
